heading: Use of methane-fueled vehicles by Federal agencies and departments
label: 3807 Use of methane-fueled vehicles by Federal agencies and departments

children.label: a
children.text: determine the practicability of using methane vehicles in the performance of certain or all of the functions of their agencies based in counties and standard metropolitan statistical areas in which demonstrations under are being conducted; andsection 3806 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: arrange for appropriate use of methane-fueled vehicles at the earliest practicable date.
